particulars.description: The freehold land to be known as plot 1A broadland gate, postwick, norwich being part of the land known as broadland gate, maple way, postwick NR13 5HB currently registered at the land registry with title number NK465121 and part of the land known as land lying to the north of A47, postwick, norwich currently registered at the land registry with title number NK525182 and as more particularly described in a transfer of part dated 23 october 2024 made between (1) broadland gate land limited and (2) 1784 UK holdings 1 limited.. Provisionally allocated title number NK540598.

The freehold land to be known as plot 1A broadland gate, postwick, norwich being part of the land known as broadland gate, maple way, postwick NR13 5HB currently registered at the land registry with title number NK465121 and part of the land known as land lying to the north of A47, postwick, norwich currently registered at the land registry with title number NK525182 and as more particularly described in a transfer of part dated 23 october 2024 made between (1) broadland gate land limited and (2) 1784 UK holdings 1 limited.. Provisionally allocated title number NK540598.

All that land known as plot 1A broadland gate, postwick, norwich transferred to the company pursuant to a transfer dated 23 october 2024 made between broadland gate land limited and the borrower, the registration of which is pending a hm land registry with new title number of NK540598 allocated to it.
